patch.value: Normalize stale audit containers and intentional-open resolved items
Tracker cleanup for stale open audit containers and resolved-but-open items that should be closed, repurposed, or explicitly kept recurring without mis-bucketing release changelogs.

Status-all duplicate evidence is recorded; pm-5dbn, pm-srex, pm-b4cp, pm-34gb, pm-lzrq, and pm-gpea are closed or repurposed with explicit ongoing acceptance criteria; pm-z5nb, pm-28cf, pm-7zs0, and pm-96wm have documented resolved/recurring disposition; pm list --status open --updated-before 2026-06-10 contains only deliberate living roots or items with fresh rationale; release-bearing changelog mis-bucketing is avoided.
